scope: custom: combat + derived_stats -- R5 Strength leverage channels + Stamina recomposition (armature reset 2026-05-29)
note: Implements Jordan's two decisions (2026-05-29): (1) Strength gets LANDING/CONTROL channels (bind win, armour-defeat window, stagger-opens-window, stamina efficiency, wield) -- converting Str from the R4-proven-dead pure-magnitude stat (+0.00 sigma-leverage) into a landing attribute. Self-test confirms Str leverage now +0.88 in-bind / +0.38 closing (was +0.00). (2) Stamina = f(Endurance, Spirit) replacing canonical Stamina=Endurance x5 -- Spirit (base tenacity/determination/fortitude/energy reserves, per Jordan's clarification) gains its first combat role; Endurance loses its action-economy MONOPOLY (was both Health-depth AND Stamina, the R3/R4 End-dominance source). Class A = canonical (STR-min wield penalty combat_v30 §5; Out-of-Breath -2D + action costs + armour drain derived_stats §4.2). Class C-proposed-canon = Stamina=f(End,Spirit) (CHANGES canonical Stamina formula; Jordan-decided, awaits ratification) + bind/stagger/stamina-efficiency (new mechanics, Jordan-directed, sim-tunable). Reuses R1/R2/M3 (already ledgered). No canon file edited; presented as proposal.

entries.quoted_text: Depleted at 0 (Out of Breath: -2D all combat rolls).
Heavy armor: +2 drain per action. Medium: +1. Light/none: +0.
Penalty if 1 below minimum: -1D Combat Pool. Cannot wield if 2+ below minimum.
Short Light 1; Short Heavy or Long Light 2; Long Heavy 3; Long Heavy Blunt 4.

entries.class: C-proposed-canon (CHANGES Stamina=End x5; Jordan-decided; awaits ratification)
entries.quoted_text: Current canon: Stamina = Endurance x 5. Jordan decision 2026-05-29: Stamina = f(Endurance, Spirit). End coefficient 3 chosen so End3/Spi3 = 15 matches the old End3 value; End retains a per-point durability premium (3 > Spirit's 2).

entries.class: C-proposed-canon (CHANGES Stamina=End x5; Jordan-decided; awaits ratification)
entries.quoted_text: Jordan decision 2026-05-29: Spirit (base tenacity/determination/mental fortitude/energy reserves) contributes to Stamina. Coefficient 2 per Spirit point; Spirit raises the reserve only (not Health-depth), giving the sustain identity without End's durability.

Bind-win dsig per Str point of advantage = LEVEL_SIGMA[minor] = 0.25. Str's primary LANDING channel: in the In-bind state the stronger fighter (with quarter-weight Agi finesse) wins the bind. New mechanic per Jordan 2026-05-29; the In-bind state is canonical (combat_v30 §4), the Str-contest weighting is the Class-C seed.

A heavy-weapon Overwhelming strike opens a sigma-window (LEVEL_SIGMA[strong]=0.75) on the victim's next defence -- converts Str magnitude into tempo. New mechanic per Jordan 2026-05-29; Overwhelming degree + heavy weapon class are canonical; the window size is the Class-C seed.

entries.class: C-proposed (canon-derived leverage from the weapon-vs-armour table; sim-tunable)
entries.quoted_text: vs armour, a heavy/blunt profile at/above STR-min opens a leverage window (LEVEL_SIGMA[moderate]=0.50, tier-scaled) -- the half-sword/poleaxe logic, distinct from the existing damage modifier. The weapon-vs-armour relationship is canonical; expressing it as a sigma-leverage window (not only damage) is the Class-C seed.

Str above the weapon's STR-min reduces per-action Stamina cost by 1 per surplus point (you swing it with less effort); below req raises it. Ties Str to the recomposed Stamina economy. New mechanic per Jordan 2026-05-29; action-cost base is canonical, the efficiency slope is the Class-C seed.
